mapper.sql: mp.mission_progress_id AS missionProgressId, mt.mission_template_id AS missionTemplateId, mt.mission_name AS missionName, mt.mission_type AS missionType, mt.upgrade_to_tier AS upgradeToTier, mp.current_value AS currentValue, mt.condition_value AS conditionValue, LEAST(FLOOR( CASE WHEN mt.condition_value = 0 THEN 100 ELSE mp.current_value * 100 / mt.condition_value END ), 100) AS progressRate, mp.status AS status, mt.reward_point AS rewardPoint, mp.completed_at AS completedAt
AND ( mp.status = 'COMPLETED' OR mt.upgrade_to_tier = CASE e.employee_tier WHEN 'C' THEN 'B' WHEN 'B' THEN 'A' WHEN 'A' THEN 'S' WHEN 'S' THEN 'S+' END )
mapper.select:
SELECT ranked.missionProgressId, ranked.missionTemplateId, ranked.missionName, ranked.missionType, ranked.upgradeToTier, ranked.currentValue, ranked.conditionValue, ranked.progressRate, ranked.status, ranked.rewardPoint, ranked.completedAt FROM ( SELECT , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY mt.mission_template_id ORDER BY CASE WHEN mp.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC, mp.current_value DESC, COALESCE(mp.completed_at, mp.updated_at, mp.created_at) DESC, mp.mission_progress_id DESC ) AS rowNumber FROM mission_progress mp JOIN mission_template mt ON mp.mission_template_id = mt.mission_template_id JOIN employee e ON e.employee_id = mp.employee_id WHERE mp.employee_id = #{employeeId} AND mt.is_active = true
) ranked WHERE ranked.rowNumber = 1 ORDER BY FIELD(ranked.upgradeToTier, 'B', 'A', 'S', 'S+'), CASE WHEN ranked.status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC, ranked.currentValue DESC
